title: SillySymphonic Mod Compats and More
description: Compat tweaks for modpacks by SillySymphonic.
body:
# Tweaks and more for modpacks by SillySymphonic.

Like my modpack, this resource pack was part of my personal game, and I'm uploading primarily to share with friends. I had a need to make some of the mods work more seamlessly without ruining the tone of the modpack. I also had some texture tweaks for myself that I was using, so they're thrown in here as well.

## Features
- Vanilla Minecraft
 > - Retextured the Elytra to be themed after moss and flowering azalea bushes.
 > - Retextured the Totem of Undying with my skin! This is kinda an easter egg for my server group.
 > - Retextured all signs to have a log texture on the hanging beam.
 > - Retextured variants of Axolotl buckets for their different colors.
 > - Animated certain textures including all animal buckets, raw fish, echo shards, glistering melon, glow ink sacs, gold ingots, golden carrots, and liquid buckets.
 > - Retextured all bed items to be equivalent to the Bedrock sprites.
 > - Retextured large plants to be more representative of the plant, including big dripleaf, lilac, peony, pitcher plant, rose bush, small dripleaf, spore blossom, and sunflower.
 > - Retextured the Bamboo Sign to have a bamboo stick supporting it.
 > - Retextured the Comparator and Repeater to have their bases.
 > - Retextured the Debug Stick to be different from the Stick.
 > - Retextured the Map to look like there's a map drawn on it.
 > - Retextured the Frogspawn, Honeycomb, Slimeball, Magma Cream, Nether Sprouts, and Redstone Torch to be more vanilla.
 > - Gave all vanilla paintings their unique textures.
 > - Tweaked the Bee Nest and the Beehive to represent their fill level.
 > - Gave variations to the Red Mushroom Block and Bricks.
 > - Retextured the tops of all log blocks to be "rounded."
 > - Retextured Barrels and Spruce Trapdoor to line up better with Spruce Planks.
 > - Cleaned up the texture noise on all Wall variants.
 > - Removed Herobrine..?
- [Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts)
 > - Retextured the Umbrella to represent a rustic homemade umbrella.
 > - Retextured the Night Vision Goggles to match copper armor.
 > - Retextured the Plastic Drinking Hat to have tin cups on a leather hat. Also renamed to the Tin Drinking Hat.
 > - Retextured the Snorkel to match copper armor.
 > - Retextured the Helium Flamingo to look like a horse. Also renamed to the Inner Tube.
 > - Retextured the Digging Claws to be made of iron.
 > - Retextured the Feral Claws to be a lighter iron color with red details.
 > - Retextured the Flippers to match copper armor.
 > - Retextured the Running Shoes to look like golden sandals. Also renamed to the Sprinting Sandals.
 > - Renamed the Superstitious Hat to the Lucky Hat.
 > - Renamed the Onion Ring to the Vitality Bracer.
- [Bag of Yurting](https://modrinth.com/mod/bag-of-yurting)
 > - Renamed the Yurt Sack to Camping Pack to better match the vibes.
 > - Retextured the Yurt sack to match the rename and the vibes.
- [Basic Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/basicweapons)
 > - Renamed Hammer to Warhammer to be less confusing with other hammer-like items.
 > - Retextured the Spear to match the 1.21.11 spear texture.
- [Bonded](https://modrinth.com/mod/bonded)
 > - Retextured the Tool Bench to be more in line with vanilla Minecraft.
 > - Retextured the Repair Bench to be more in line with vanilla Minecraft.
- [Cosy Critters & Creepy Crawlies](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosy-critters)
 > - Retextured the Crow to match a more vanilla style.
 > - Retextured the Moth the match a more vanilla style.
- [Dusty Decorations](https://modrinth.com/mod/dusty-decorations)
 > - Renamed the Cooking Pot to Cast Iron Pot to be less confusing with other pot-like items.
 > - Renamed the Rope to Tied Rope to be less confusing with other rope-like items.
 > - Renamed the Frying Pan to Iron Frying Pan to be less confusing with other pan-like items.
 > - Renamed the Cow Skull to Bovine Skull to be less confusing with other skull-like items.
 > - Renamed the Wolf Skull to Canine Skull to be less confusing with other skull-like items.
- [Etcetera](https://modrinth.com/mod/etcetera)
 > - Renamed the Light Bulb and Tinted Light Bulb to Large Light Bulb and Large Tinted Light Bulb respectively to be less confusing with other bulb-like items.
 > - Renamed the Wrench to Bismuth Wrench to be less confusing with other wrench-like items.
- [Handcrafted](https://modrinth.com/mod/handcrafted)
 > - Renamed the Hammer to Wood Mallet to be less confusing with other hammer-like items.
 > - Retextured the Hammer (Wood Mallet) to be wooden mallet with iron bracers to better reflect the new name and be visually different from other hammer-like items.
 > - Renamed all Cushions to Decorative Cushion to be less confusing with other cushion-like items.
- [Hang Glider](https://modrinth.com/mod/hang-glider)
 > - Retextured all Gliders represent a more rustic homemade glider as opposed to the original modern sporty glider.
- [Herbalist](https://modrinth.com/mod/herbalist)
 > - Fixed a bug where the names and textures weren't defined for the status effects Fractal, Reality Bend, Disassociated, Mirage, and Acid.
 > - Made the alternate names from the core mod into the default names used.
- [Hole Filler Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/hole-filler-mod)
 > - Retextured all Hole Fillers with their v1.0 textures.
 > - Retextured the Hole Filler Pack to be unique from the vanilla Bundle texture.
- [Immersive Melodies](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-melodies)
 > - Retextured all instruments to match a more vanilla style.
- [Immersive Paintings](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-paintings)
 > - Retextured the Graffiti and Glow Graffiti to match a more vanilla style.
- [Incendium](https://modrinth.com/mod/incendium)
 > - Fixed a bug where the biome names weren't defined.
- [Just Hammers](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-hammers)
 > - Renamed the base Hammers to Sledgehammer to be less confusing with other hammer-like items.
- [Macaw's Holidays](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-holidays)
 > - Renamed each Present to Decorative Present to be less confusing with other present-like items.
- [Naturalist](https://modrinth.com/mod/naturalist)
 > - Fixed a bug where the name for Moose wasn't defined.
- [Nullscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/nullscape)
 > - Fixed a bug where the biome names weren't defined.
- [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)
 > - Fixed a bug where the block name for the water Pink Petals weren't defined. Named them Floating Pink Petals.
- [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)
 > - Renamed Flute to Bamboo Flute to be less confusing with other flute-like items.
- [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)
 > - Fixed a bug where the biome names weren't defined.
- [Veggies Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/veggies-delight)
 > - Fixed the capitalization of Zucchini Seeds
 > - Fixed a bug where the crop blocks for Cauliflower, Broccoli, Bell Pepper, Garlic, Sweet Potato, Turnip, and Zucchini had no names defined.
- [Whimsy Deco](https://modrinth.com/mod/whimsy-deco)
 > - Renamed Paper Lanterns to Whimsical Paper Lantern to be less confusing with otehr paper lantern-like items.
 > - Renamed Ship Helm to Ship Wheel to be less confusing with otehr helm-like items.


### Known Issues
- [Nether Depths Upgrade](https://modrinth.com/mod/nether-depths-upgrade)
 > - I tried to fix the names of the Tall Crimson Seagrass and Tall Warped Seagrass blocks not being defined, but it isn't working? Idk why.
- [My Sanity](https://www.webpagetest.org/blank.html)
 > - Not found.
